message:
fix(azure): ensure stream Start event emits on finish-only chunks

When Azure sends a chunk containing only a finish_reason with no content
delta, the stream would emit Done without ever having emitted Start,
violating the streaming event contract. Now calls ensure_started()
before processing finish_reason to guarantee the Start event is always
emitted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
